title: Smoky Roast Dinner
description: A delicious roast dinner with a smoky twist. This dish is perfect for a cold winter night.

ingredients.name: Pistachio Crust
ingredients.notes: Add a nutty flavor to your roast

ingredients.name: Roast Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Choose high-quality potatoes for a crispy outside

ingredients.name: Caramelized Onions
ingredients.notes: Slow cook the onions for a sweet flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh Thyme
ingredients.notes: Add a classic herb flavor to your roast

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic for a pungent flavor

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality oil for roasting

ingredients.name: Worcestershire Sauce
ingredients.notes: Add a savory flavor to your roast

instructions: Season the roast with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the roast for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the roast to a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot.
Add the caramelized onions, pistachio crust, and Worcestershire sauce to the pot.
Roast the beef in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes per pound, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the roast from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
Toss the roast potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy.
Serve the sliced roast with the roasted potatoes and caramelized onions.
